zh.lifeSummary: 當Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog於1160年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾波維斯 卡素時，他的父親Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I39歲，母親Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd26歲。他和Gwladys ferch Ithel至少有6個兒子。他去世於1236年在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福享年76歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯丹比爾利藍希利奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog于1160年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾波維斯 卡素时，他的父亲Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I39岁，母亲Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd26岁。他和Gwladys ferch Ithel至少有6个儿子。他去世于1236年在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福享年76岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯丹比爾利藍希利奧。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog was born in 1160, in Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I, was 39 and his mother, Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd, was 26. He had at least 6 sons with Gwladys ferch Ithel. He died in 1236, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog est né en 1160, à Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Gwladys ferch Ithel. Il est décédé en 1236, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog 1160 in Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I 39 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd 26. Er hatte mit Gwladys ferch Ithel mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1236 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Ludlow, Shropshire, England und wurde in Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadogが1160年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアポウィス カストルで生まれた時，父Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog Iは39歳，母Angharad ferch Owain Gwyneddは26歳であった。彼はGwladys ferch Ithelとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1236年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで76歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアラントイシリオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog(이)가 1160년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 파위스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Gwladys ferch Ithel(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1236년 영국 슈럽실르 루들로에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랜티실리오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog nasceu em 1160, em Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Gwladys ferch Ithel. Ele faleceu em 1236, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog родился в 1160 г. в местности поуис кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd, 26. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Gwladys ferch Ithel. Он умер в 1236 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности ллантисилио, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog nació en 1160, en Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Gwladys ferch Ithel. Murió en 1236, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
